text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I'd like to proceed. Can I count on
you?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! That's an okey-dokey, delishy-fishy from me!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...I've heard you use that expression before, but
what does "okey-dokey, delishy-fishy" actually
mean?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I assume the first part means "okay," but what
does "delishy-fishy "refer to?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Huh? I guess delicious seafood... right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Does it mean you... know your seafood? And if
so, how does that connect to "okay"?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Well, fish are like, super tasty? And when you eat
top-tier food, the vibe you're giving improves,
and that brings all the party people to you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
In other words, if you eat something incredibly
delicious, you're more open and receptive to
things. Hence you're more likely to give an
emphatic "okay."

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa, slay! Your take is god-tier!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Still, there was so much layered
nuance to that term. You're quite learned, Helios.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you're making me blush! Anytime you want
me to drop my wisdom, you know where to find
me!
